tools.name: eth_vrp
tools.description: ETH Volatility Risk Premium (DVOL minus Parkinson realized vol, 72h). Positive = sell-vol opportunity, negative = buy-vol. Returns regime (LOW/MID/HIGH) and raw audit inputs (DVOL, RV_72h, RV_6h, spot). Live (~60s cache). $0.001 USDC on Base per call.

tools.name: btc_vrp
tools.description: BTC Volatility Risk Premium (DVOL minus Parkinson realized vol, 72h). Positive = sell-vol opportunity, negative = buy-vol. Returns regime (LOW/MID/HIGH) and raw audit inputs (DVOL, RV_72h, RV_6h, spot). Live (~60s cache). $0.001 USDC on Base per call.

tools.name: agent_sofr
tools.description: Agent-SOFR: decentralized USD short-rate benchmark for AI agents (weighted-median of 7 sources + variance + regime premiums; BNS-calibrated 6-mode classifier). Use as the risk-free benchmark for lend/borrow decisions. Returns annualized rate (%), its decomposition, current regime, and methodology. $

tools.name: max_ltv
tools.description: Maximum-safe LTV for a collateralized agent loan — from variance over the loan horizon plus a 6-mode regime cap. Returns max_ltv, the math vs regime-cap binding constraint (so the agent sees WHY), regime, and sigma over the horizon. $0.001 USDC on Base.
